Program Director

Example Company

Cambridge, MA (Hybrid)

About the role

You will lead enterprise-scale transformation programs and PMO execution.

Responsibilities

  • Define operating model, governance, and delivery standards.
  • Drive cross-functional alignment and remove blockers.
  • Own risk management, dependency tracking, and KPI reporting.

Qualifications

  • 10+ years of program leadership experience.
  • Experience with ERP/CRM implementation and change management.
  • Compensation range: $210,000 - $260,000 annually.
